TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kudrengere, title = Kudrengere, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kudrengere} }

S.FORM: Kudrengere Itiniay i Wutai Cen no Pingtung ko Kudrengere a niyaro', 68 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 193 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 97% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 187 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 3% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 6 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 48%, Rukai 47%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, roma 1%.
S.PHON: ko~u~u…¨~…ģr…ôŇč…ôr…ô itiniaj i wo~u~utai ¶…ôn no~u piŇčto~u~uŇč ko~u ko~u~u…¨~…ģr…ôŇč…ôr…ô a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u paiwan **%, ro~u~ukai **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, amis *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Kudrengere Itiniay i Wutai Cen no Pingtung ko Kudrengere a niyaro', 68 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 193 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 97% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 187 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 3% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 6 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 48%, Rukai 47%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, roma 1%.
S.PHON: ko~u~u…¨~…ģr…ôŇč…ôr…ô itiniaj i wo~u~utai ¶…ôn no~u piŇčto~u~uŇč ko~u ko~u~u…¨~…ģr…ôŇč…ôr…ô a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u paiwan **%, ro~u~ukai **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, amis *%, ro~uma *%.
